evals.name: podium-finish-broadcast
evals.prompt: Generate AI race analysis for this race data using broadcast commentator tone at standard depth
evals.expected_output: Dramatic, enthusiastic commentary about a P2 finish with specific lap references, structured sections, and excitement about the battle for position

commentaryLog.title: Position Gained!
commentaryLog.text: Moved up to P7 with a clean pass

commentaryLog.title: Personal Best!
commentaryLog.text: New fastest lap: 1:42.347

commentaryLog.title: Podium Battle!
commentaryLog.text: Into P3 — fighting for the podium

commentaryLog.title: P2!
commentaryLog.text: Passed for second place on the inside of Turn 1

assertions.text: Response is valid JSON with summary field
References specific lap numbers from the data
Tone is enthusiastic/dramatic (broadcast style)
Includes paceAnalysis, keyMoments, improvements, nextFocus sections

evals.name: high-incidents-coach
evals.prompt: Generate AI race analysis using racing engineer tone at standard depth for a rough race with many incidents
evals.expected_output: Direct, analytical debrief addressing the 8 incidents head-on, identifying where pace dropped, data-driven suggestions for improvement

commentaryLog.title: Incident!
commentaryLog.text: Contact with wall exiting Eau Rouge

commentaryLog.title: Off Track
commentaryLog.text: Ran wide at Blanchimont — lost two positions

commentaryLog.title: Position Lost
commentaryLog.text: Dropped to P14 after spin

commentaryLog.title: Spin!
commentaryLog.text: Lost the rear through Pouhon — barely saved it

assertions.text: Response is valid JSON with summary field
Directly addresses the high incident count (8)
Tone is analytical and direct (not sugar-coating)
References specific corners/events from commentary log

evals.name: new-driver-mentor-quick
evals.prompt: Generate AI race analysis using friendly mentor tone at quick depth for a mid-pack finish
evals.expected_output: Short, encouraging 2-sentence summary that celebrates what went well before any critique. No structured sections — just a tight paragraph.

commentaryLog.title: Gained Position
commentaryLog.text: Clean pass into the hairpin

commentaryLog.title: Personal Best!
commentaryLog.text: 1:05.800 — new best

assertions.text: Response is valid JSON with summary field
Response contains only summary (no paceAnalysis, keyMoments, etc.)
Tone is encouraging and approachable
Summary is concise (under 100 words)

evals.name: held-position-quiet-race-coach
evals.prompt: Generate AI race analysis using racing engineer tone at standard depth for a quiet, unremarkable race where not much happened
evals.expected_output: Analytical debrief that finds useful observations in a race with no drama — lap time consistency, tyre management, and small areas to find time. Should not manufacture excitement that wasn't there.

commentaryLog.title: Position Lost
commentaryLog.text: Dropped to P8 — passed on the outside into the Attwood Curve

commentaryLog.title: Position Gained
commentaryLog.text: Retook P7 with a cutback into the hairpin

assertions.text: Response is valid JSON with all standard sections
Notes the 0-incident clean race
Observes the gradual pace degradation (tyre temps climbing, times rising)
Does not over-hype a quiet race — tone matches the data

evals.name: close-battle-lost-out-broadcast
evals.prompt: Generate AI race analysis using broadcast tone at standard depth for a close fight that didn't go the driver's way
evals.expected_output: Dramatic retelling of the wheel-to-wheel battle with empathy for the result. Should reference the position swaps and acknowledge the effort even though the outcome was disappointing.

commentaryLog.title: Position Gained!
commentaryLog.text: Up to P6 — clean move under braking into Turn 1

commentaryLog.title: Close Battle
commentaryLog.text: Side by side through Sunset Bend — held the position

commentaryLog.title: Position Lost
commentaryLog.text: Lost P5 on the exit of Turn 7 — slight oversteer cost the spot

commentaryLog.title: Pit Entry
commentaryLog.text: Boxing for fuel and tyres

commentaryLog.title: Close Battle
commentaryLog.text: Back at it with the same car — nose to tail through the esses

commentaryLog.title: Position Lost
commentaryLog.text: Outbraked into Turn 17 — dropped to P6 for good

assertions.text: Response is valid JSON with all standard sections
References the recurring battle and position swaps
Acknowledges the frustration of losing out while recognizing the effort
Notes the pit stop and its impact on the race

evals.name: slow-start-strong-finish-mentor
evals.prompt: Generate AI race analysis using friendly mentor tone at standard depth for a driver who struggled early but found rhythm late
evals.expected_output: Encouraging analysis that highlights the improvement arc. Should celebrate the recovery and draw specific comparisons between early and late pace.

commentaryLog.title: Off Track
commentaryLog.text: Ran wide at Turn 10A on the opening lap — lost two spots

commentaryLog.title: Position Gained
commentaryLog.text: Moved up to P12 with improving pace

commentaryLog.title: Personal Best!
commentaryLog.text: New fastest: 1:28.900

commentaryLog.title: Position Gained
commentaryLog.text: Into the top 10 — P10

assertions.text: Response is valid JSON with all standard sections
Highlights the improvement trend from early to late laps (6+ seconds gained)
Frames the rocky start positively — recovery narrative, not criticism
References the personal best on lap 11

evals.name: pit-strategy-deep-coach
evals.prompt: Generate AI race analysis using racing engineer tone at deep depth for a longer race with pit strategy
evals.expected_output: Thorough analysis with detailed lap-by-lap trends, stint comparisons, fuel usage analysis, tyre degradation curves, and a strategy recommendation. Should be noticeably longer and more granular than standard depth.

commentaryLog.title: Position Gained
commentaryLog.text: Up to P5 with a move into the Bus Stop

commentaryLog.title: Personal Best!
commentaryLog.text: 1:45.800 — quick lap

commentaryLog.title: Position Lost
commentaryLog.text: Passed by faster car on the banking — dropped to P5

commentaryLog.title: Pit Entry
commentaryLog.text: First stop — fuel and tyres

commentaryLog.title: Close Battle
commentaryLog.text: Fighting for P3 out of the pits

commentaryLog.title: Position Lost
commentaryLog.text: Lost P3 — undercut didn't quite work

commentaryLog.title: Pit Entry
commentaryLog.text: Second stop — splash and go considered but took full service

assertions.text: Response is valid JSON with all deep sections including strategyNote
Compares pace across the three stints
Notes the tyre degradation pattern (temps climbing ~1°C per lap)
Includes a concrete strategy recommendation for the next race
Response is noticeably longer/more detailed than standard depth evals
